title: sagina apetala var. pachyrrhiza
intro: Sagina apetala var. pachyrrhiza is a plant species in the caryophyllaceae family, commonly known as marsh dewgrass. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sagina apetala var. pachyrrhiza include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used to treat minor wounds, cuts, and skin irritations.
